microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's resilience validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing activation workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, self-serve model reusable across org-wide surfaces.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**—surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation loop across enterprise infrastructure.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across engineering, GTM, and support partners.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured lifecycle workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21%—directly compounding team output on a lean product org.

Defined instrumentation standards and funnel metrics for the resilience program, enabling data-driven prioritization of high-leverage automation bets and surfacing retention-equivalent insights on enterprise customer recovery health.

Partnered with engineering and design to translate ambiguous platform requirements into scoped, measurable product experiences—owning interaction patterns, rollout sequencing, and quality standards across sovereign and commercial cloud environments.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI product adoption** for code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training that activated 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**—mirroring a PLG activation loop from first touch to durable habit.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by running 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer behavior into **concrete prioritization bets**.

Accelerated knowledge retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and expanding off-surface access to enterprise content across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams—bringing structure to an ambiguous, high-stakes opportunity space.

Defined a **growth roadmap** to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region and mapping automation paths across critical execution workflows.

Built a **Power BI funnel dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface activation gaps, target high-impact automation investments, and measure progress against efficiency OKRs.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping activation dependencies across 1,200+ stations—translating ambiguous scope into a sequenced, measurable rollout plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority backlog tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and accelerate feature delivery across robotics platform teams.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, compressing the software deployment cycle by 25% and building a repeatable expansion model for future fleet rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job **bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process—improving activation rates from first customer touch through closed conversion.

Reduced **customer acquisition cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website funnel and Google profile to meet users at existing off-surface entry points.

Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks across service lines, delivering data-driven recommendations that shaped the company's retention and profitability strategy.
